leanings.why: Devout past her orders; the night-soup is her liturgy.
The Mission's most faithful madman; the pot never turns him away.
Grandmother of the Arcade tithes every season and expects heaven notarized.
A captain who tithes after every crossing - storms respect bookkeeping.
The Row's counters turned the Gullet away in the bad year; Mag returned the favor permanently.
Chased from the stalls once too often; sells to Fenner because the Row will not have him.
The Deep Keel undercuts the Row's rates and both sides know it.
The Promise carries the Row's cargo on a handshake manifest.
The King's Bond works hand-in-glove with the law it stores forfeits for.
The bank pays for its own guard and the Watch appreciates a paying citizen.
The impound keeper is the Watch's own man in everything but the wage line.
The Bilge serves whoever the Watch seeks, below the waterline where names stop.
The Gull's back room has spoiled too many of the Watch's clean cases.
The quiet tenant is well liked along the quays - covers hold best when the crowd vouches for them.
Pen-side folk and quay folk share feed sacks, weather and grudges.

notes: Sprint-2 WORLD faction-roster refinement (S1-3 follow-through): per-actor leanings where the job->faction mapping is too coarse - a Temple-devout serf captain, Merchant-hostile wastrels, Watch-adjacent keepers. Baked deterministically as seeded FactionStandings deltas on the notable's actor id (spawn-site-bound via notables.json). Values are authored constants in [-100,100]; tuning guard: negative WATCH seeds stay above -20 (below the Barter surcharge band and far above the -60 refusal line) so no authored leaning can perturb food access or the starvation bars; negative MERCHANTS seeds are mechanically inert in Barter (only positive standing discounts) and exist for BarkSelector attitude texture (-25 and below greets 'cold'). Faction keys validate against the wired FactionRegistry at bake.
